_doc: Per-image Gemini prompts for Agentic Architecture for Vibe Founders. {palette} resolves at runtime.

cover.prompt:
Editorial book cover for a downloadable lead magnet PDF. Aspect: portrait, 3:4, US letter book cover proportions.

CRITICAL TEXT-RENDERING RULES:
1. The image must contain ONLY the text pieces listed under TEXT TO RENDER below. No other text. No font names. No instructions. No labels beyond what is listed.
2. Never render the words 'Inter', 'Inter Regular', 'Inter Display Bold', 'JetBrains Mono', 'sans serif', or any typography or font instruction inside the image.
3. Spell every rendered word exactly as written, character for character.
4. The 5 stacked layer cards must NOT contain any text labels, layer names, layer numbers, or written content of any kind on the cards themselves. They are pure geometric shapes with small embedded icons only.
5. The icons embedded inside the layer cards must be tiny abstract line-art symbols, NOT realistic clip art. No emoji.

TEXT TO RENDER (exactly these pieces, nothing more):
A. Top-left small pill, uppercase, two words: FREE PLAYBOOK
B. Upper-third headline across two lines: line 1 reads 'Agentic Architecture', line 2 reads 'for Vibe Founders'.
C. Subtitle inside a horizontal off-white translucent panel directly below the headline, one short line: The 5-layer questionnaire system. Dual model routing. Parallel task fan-out. The 90-day build plan.
D. Bottom-left small wordmark: AI BrandFactory

CENTRAL VISUAL (this is the hero of the cover, fills the lower 60 percent of the cover):
A stylized 5-layer DISCRETE STACK diagram. 5 horizontal rounded-rectangle cards stacked vertically with small uniform vertical gaps between them. Each card is progressively narrower as you go down (Layer 1 widest at the top, Layer 5 narrowest at the bottom), creating a stepped funnel-like silhouette but with each card as a distinct discrete element separated by clear gaps. NOT a continuous funnel shape. NOT a smooth tapering wedge. Five clearly separate rounded rectangles, each about 70 percent as wide as the card above it.

The 5 cards from top to bottom:
- Card 1 (widest, at the top): off-white #FAF9FF fill at about 90 percent opacity, thin bright cyan #06B6D4 outline (about 2 px). Embedded centered icon: a small abstract question mark symbol in off-white line work, no fill. About 1/8 the card width.
- Card 2: same off-white fill at 80 percent opacity, thin bright cyan outline. Embedded centered icon: three small horizontal dots arranged in a horizontal row, off-white line work.
- Card 3: same off-white fill at 70 percent opacity, thin bright cyan outline. Embedded centered icon: a small Q-and-A speech bubble shape (two overlapping rounded rectangles) in off-white line work.
- Card 4: same off-white fill at 60 percent opacity, thin bright cyan outline. Embedded centered icon: a small lock shape (rectangle body with a curved shackle on top) in off-white line work.
- Card 5 (narrowest, at the bottom): off-white fill at 50 percent opacity but with a stronger bright cyan #06B6D4 inner glow. Bright cyan outline (about 3 px, slightly thicker than the others). Embedded centered icon: a small forking arrow (one line splitting into 3 thin arrows fanning outward) in bright cyan line work.

Thin bright cyan #06B6D4 connecting lines run vertically between the cards in the gaps, with small arrowheads pointing downward to signal the flow from Layer 1 down to Layer 5.

BELOW THE STACK:
Two small icons at the bottom of the composition, side by side, separated by a thin off-white horizontal line:
- Left icon: a small abstract 'smart brain' symbol. A simple line-art outline of a brain shape (two lobes, simplified curved contours) in off-white line work, about 1/10 the cover width. Below it, a tiny bright cyan dot.
- Right icon: a small abstract 'cheap hands' symbol. A simple line-art outline of two open hands (palms-up, simplified curved contours) in off-white line work, about 1/10 the cover width. Below it, a tiny bright cyan dot.
Both icons sit in soft circular cyan glow halos at very low opacity, telegraphing the dual-routing implication of the architecture.

TYPOGRAPHY:
- Cover headline lines 1 and 2: large bold sans-serif display face, off-white #FAF9FF, tight letter spacing.
- Subtitle panel: clean medium-weight sans-serif, slate #1E293B inside the off-white panel.
- Top-left pill: condensed mono-spaced face, bright cyan #06B6D4.
- Wordmark: clean light-weight sans-serif, off-white.

Design language:
- Premium editorial cover with a stylized 5-layer discrete stack composition as the topic-specific centerpiece.
- Background: deep indigo #1A0B4B to electric purple #7C3AED diagonal gradient at 135 degrees, subtle bright cyan bloom upper right.
- Layout: pill + headline + subtitle panel in upper third, the 5-layer stack composition dominates the lower 60 percent, brain-and-hands icons at the bottom, wordmark anchored bottom-left.
- Subtle paper grain texture across the whole frame.
- Echoes the system-illustration approach of P09 Multi-Agent Playbook (a topic-specific central composition that telegraphs the playbook content) with the discrete stepped stack of 5 cards replacing the hexagon network.

Color palette: {palette}.

What to avoid:
- No diagonal cyan accent line crossing the frame.
- No grid of small text pills (no WHAT IS INSIDE row).
- No funnel composition with smooth continuous walls (that was P38, do not reuse). The 5 cards are DISCRETE rectangles with gaps between them, not a continuous funnel.
- No concentric rings composition (that was P37, do not reuse).
- No horizontal stacked-bars composition (that was P36).
- No vintage ad mockups or fanned card stack composition (that was P39, do not reuse).
- No location pin network (that was P40, do not reuse).
- No flow / pipeline / arrow-river composition.
- No realistic brain anatomy or realistic hand photography. The brain and hands icons are abstract simplified line work.
- No human figures, no faces, no avatars, no illustrations of people.
- No browser window mockups, no soundwave shapes, no sound bars.
- No emoji icons.
- No realistic clip art, no realistic illustrations of laptops, phones, screens, or apps.
- No literal brand logos. No model brand names visible (no 'Claude', 'GPT', 'Gemini' written as text).
- No text labels on the layer cards. No layer numbers written on the cards. The cards are pure geometric shapes with one embedded abstract icon each.

Output: a single high-quality cover image, print-ready, 4K.

hero.prompt:
Wide hero banner for a squeeze page giving away 'Agentic Architecture for Vibe Founders'. Aspect: 16:9.

CRITICAL TEXT-RENDERING RULES:
- NO rendered text anywhere in the image.
- No font names or typography labels.
- No layer names, numbers, or labels of any kind on the stacked card shapes.
- No model names written as text anywhere.

Composition: a 3D-rendered isometric mockup of a US-letter PDF cover floating on the right third, soft drop shadow on a textured editorial background. The PDF cover shows the same 5-layer discrete stack composition from the cover design.

On the left two-thirds: an abstract version of the 5-layer discrete stack motif rendered at low opacity. 5 horizontal rounded-rectangle cards stacked vertically with small gaps between them, each card progressively narrower than the one above it. Off-white #FAF9FF cards with thin bright cyan #06B6D4 outlines, fading from about 50 percent opacity at the top to about 20 percent at the bottom (the inverse of the cover, to keep the eye drawn to the PDF mockup). Thin bright cyan vertical connecting arrows in the gaps between cards.

Below the stack on the left side, two tiny abstract icons: a simplified line-art brain shape and a simplified line-art open-hands shape, both in off-white line work at low opacity, separated by a thin off-white horizontal line.

Background:
- Top half: deep indigo #1A0B4B fading to electric purple #7C3AED.
- Bottom half: off-white #FAF9FF with faint mesh gradient bloom.
- PDF mockup on the dividing line.
- Subtle paper grain.

Style:
- Premium editorial, restrained.
- No people, no faces, no brand logos, no padlock or shield icons (other than the small lock embedded in Layer 4 of the stack motif, which is small and abstract), no realistic brain anatomy, no realistic hand photography.
- The 5-layer discrete stack is the recurring motif, rendered subtly so the PDF mockup remains the focal point.
- No diagonal cyan accent line. No funnel with continuous walls. No concentric rings. No vintage ad mockup card stack. No location pin network. No browser window mockup. No soundwave shapes.

Color palette: {palette}.

Output: a single 4K hero image.

og.prompt:
Open Graph social share card image, 1.91:1 widescreen.

CRITICAL TEXT-RENDERING RULES:
1. Contains ONLY the text pieces listed below.
2. No font names or typography instructions.
3. Spell every word exactly as written.
4. NO labels, layer names, or written content of any kind on the stacked card shapes on the right.
5. NO model brand names written as text anywhere in the image.

TEXT TO RENDER:
A. Top-left small pill, uppercase: AI BRANDFACTORY
B. Centered massive headline two lines: line 1 reads 'Agentic Architecture', line 2 reads 'for Vibe Founders'. Line 2 should be smaller than line 1.
C. Below headline, off-white rounded subtitle pill, one line: The 5-layer questionnaire system, dual model routing, parallel fan-out, and a 90-day build plan
D. Below subtitle pill, horizontal text strip with middle-dot separators: Vibe Founder Frame · 5-Layer Architecture · Dual Model Routing · Parallel Fan-Out · State and Resume · Toolkit · 90-Day Plan
E. Bottom-right small label, faded: files.aibrandfactory.com

TYPOGRAPHY:
- Top-left pill: condensed mono-spaced, bright cyan #06B6D4.
- Headline line 1: massive bold sans-serif, off-white #FAF9FF.
- Headline line 2: smaller medium-weight sans-serif, off-white at 80% opacity.
- Subtitle: clean medium-weight sans-serif, slate #1E293B inside pill.
- Stages strip: clean medium-weight sans-serif, bright cyan #06B6D4, smaller size.
- Bottom-right label: clean sans-serif, off-white 70%.

Background: deep indigo to electric purple diagonal gradient at 135 degrees. On the right third, an abstract version of the 5-layer discrete stack motif: 5 horizontal rounded-rectangle cards stacked vertically with small gaps between them, each card progressively narrower than the one above. Off-white cards with thin bright cyan outlines at 60 percent opacity. The narrowest card at the bottom has a soft bright cyan inner glow. Thin bright cyan connecting arrows run vertically in the gaps between cards. The stack composition occupies the right third of the OG card without overlapping the headline text on the left.

What to avoid:
- No people, no faces, no brand logos, no padlock or shield icons large enough to be confused with the central composition, no realistic brain anatomy, no realistic hand photography.
- No additional text beyond the pieces listed.
- No labels or numbers on the layer cards.
- No reuse of the diagonal cyan accent line motif. No funnel with continuous walls (P38). No vintage ad mockup card stack (P39). No concentric rings (P37). No location pin network (P40). No browser window or soundwave compositions.

Color palette: {palette}.

Output: sharp, ready as og:image.

notion-cover.prompt:
Wide editorial banner for a Notion page header. Aspect 21:9.

CRITICAL CONSTRAINT: NO title, NO headline, NO wordmark, NO logo, NO labels in the corners. NO legible English words anywhere in the image. NO labels or numbers on the layer card shapes. NO model brand names written as text.

Composition:
- Background: deep indigo #1A0B4B on the left fading to electric purple #7C3AED on the right, subtle bright cyan #06B6D4 bloom upper right.
- Across the full frame edge-to-edge, distributed as a horizontal repeating motif: three discrete 5-layer stack compositions side by side at varying scales (small left, medium center, slightly larger right). Each is a vertical arrangement of 5 rounded-rectangle cards with progressively narrower widths from top to bottom and small gaps between cards.
- Each stack uses off-white #FAF9FF cards with thin bright cyan #06B6D4 outlines. Opacity varies across the three stacks (left stack at 30 percent opacity, center stack at 60 percent, right stack at 40 percent) to create depth without overwhelming the banner.
- The narrowest card in each stack (the bottom card) has a soft bright cyan glow ring around it.
- Thin bright cyan vertical connecting arrows in the gaps between cards in each stack.
- Below each stack, two tiny abstract icons: a simplified line-art brain shape and a simplified line-art open-hands shape, in off-white line work at very low opacity, separated by a thin off-white horizontal line. The brain and hands icons are about 1/15 the banner height, just enough to be recognizable as the dual-routing motif.
- Subtle paper grain across the entire banner.

What to avoid:
- No corner text. No wordmark. No logos.
- No brand logos of any kind.
- No legible English text or labels anywhere.
- No realistic brain anatomy. No realistic hand photography.
- No emoji, no clip art, no realistic icons.
- No diagonal accent line crossing the frame.
- No padlock or shield icons large enough to dominate.
- No funnel with continuous walls (P38). No concentric rings composition (P37). No vintage ad mockup card stack (P39). No location pin network (P40). No browser window or soundwave compositions.

Color palette: {palette}.

Output: a single high-quality 4K cinematic banner.
